subject: docs(specs): add GBP, email marketing, and SA context sections
body:
Added Google Business Profile photo specs, email marketing dimensions
(with Mailchimp/Klaviyo/Constant Contact notes, dark mode, rendering
differences), and South Africa strategic context (posting times for
load shedding, data cost considerations, cultural engagement tips).
